hypothesis: If Segment Anything Model 2 is fine-tuned end-to-end on a physics-informed synthetic LPTEM video dataset spanning liquid thickness (SNR) and resolution variations with box-prompt conditioning, then it will achieve higher segmentation accuracy (IoU/F1/J&F) and centroid agreement on both synthetic and real LPTEM videos than a U-Net baseline, because SAM’s broad visual pretraining combined with domain-matched synthetic coverage enables robust generalization to low-contrast, overlapping-particle conditions.
